title: [HandshakeToHW] Initial elaboration of module internals
body: This commit provides the infrastructure used to generate handshake module internals. This initial commit contains implementations of fork and join components, which follow directly from their `HandshakeToFIRRTL` implementation. Any other op in the `test_simple_loop.mlir` test is implemented as an external module. Once this commit is merged, implementations for these will be pushed in followup commits.
